title: Settings Prompt Input Redesign
sourceSummary: 用户确认的 /settings prompt input 改造请求。现状来源为用户描述加代码推断，确认前标注为未视觉验证。

surface.name: /settings prompt input component
evidenceRefs: 用户描述 /settings prompt input component
代码推断，用户确认前标注为未视觉验证

keep: Existing settings page route and navigation
Existing submit logic and component API
Existing product tokens and icon set
Existing data flow for saved prompt content
change: Local density and helper text placement
avoid: Do not add permissions, API behavior, or database schema
Do not invent real team prompt data
Do not use rounded cards with colored side borders as emphasis

confirmation.quote: 确认这个目标界面和变更边界。
